appearance.title: Appearance & theme
appearance.sub: Pick the interface theme. Applies instantly, no confirmation.
appearance.defaultDesc: Warm cream, serif body — a study-room reading feel
appearance.manuscriptDesc: Hatched lines, dashed borders — scholarly research feel
appearance.minimalInkDesc: Extreme B&W contrast, generous whitespace — editorial
appearance.pulpDesc: Heavy borders, offset shadow — comic / pulp print

language.title: Language
language.sub: Interface language and analysis output language
language.uiLanguageHint: Affects all UI text. Does not change book content or analysis results.
language.outputLanguageHint: Determines the language of LLM analysis responses

llm.title: LLM
llm.sub: Current model settings (read-only). Editing requires changing .env and a restart.
llm.note: A full LLM settings UI is deferred to its own ticket. This version shows status only.

env.title: Environment
env.sub: DEPLOY_MODE governs all storage-layer behavior. A developer option — most users need not adjust it.
env.lwDesc: Works out of the box, no extra services
env.stWarn: Switching to Standard requires editing .env and restarting. The fields below are a preview. Migrate before switching.
env.qdrantHint: Run a Qdrant service yourself (docker run qdrant/qdrant)
env.neoNote: Neo4j switching is the runtime exception (POST /api/v1/kg/switch) — no restart needed.
env.migIdem: Migration is idempotent — re-running will not create duplicates.
env.migQdrantSub: Export embedded Qdrant to a self-hosted service
env.migNeoNxSub: Export from Neo4j to local JSON (backup)

about.title: About & version
about.sub: Version information and key package list

planned.shortcutsSub: Customize keyboard shortcuts to speed up navigation and analysis. This feature is being planned.
planned.experimentalSub: Early access to analysis features still in development. They move to settings once stable.
